gaps.title: Stop documentation from overruling measurements
gaps.question: Do live public claims still match the committed solver, proof, and protocol artifacts?
gaps.next_action: Add a derived marker whenever a new public quantitative claim gains one canonical machine-readable source.

gaps.title: Replace aggregate decide-rate with a coverage-weighted parity matrix
gaps.question: What source-balanced and deduplicated population does each solver score actually describe?
gate_commands: for t in test_scoring test_pipeline test_selection test_provenance; do python3 scripts/smtcomp_repro/tests/$t.py || exit 1; done
gaps.next_action: Review ADR-0343 and the frozen failed-run handoff; preregister a resumable shard protocol before rerun, then add missing selection and syntax-normalized identities before any deduplicated score.

gaps.title: Measure production depth, not isolated wins
gaps.question: Where do Axeyum, Z3, and Bitwuzla win across hard cold queries and retained embedded workloads?
gaps.next_action: Add matched curves for at least three independently sourced QF_BV families, with RSS and decision-set overlap.

gaps.title: Broaden neutral correctness evidence
gaps.question: Do at least two independent external oracles agree with Axeyum in both verdict directions on every paper-claimed fragment?
gate_commands: CARGO_BUILD_JOBS=2 cargo test -p axeyum-solver --features z3 --test bv_differential_fuzz --test abv_differential_fuzz
gaps.next_action: Freeze neutral multi-oracle profiles for arrays/UF and LIA/LRA before widening to FP, strings, and quantified finite fragments.

gaps.title: Close the weak decide-rate frontiers before polishing their proofs
gaps.question: Which repeated unsupported or unknown shape names the next decision mechanism with measurable public-corpus leverage?
gaps.next_action: Select no implementation until a fresh residual-shape census identifies a repeated primitive and a preregistered row-level gate.

gaps.title: Make proof coverage a first-class denominator
gaps.question: Which exact definitive results lack serialized evidence, independent checking, trust closure, or Lean reconstruction?
gaps.next_action: Review proposed ADR-0341, then add verdict-invariant attempt and obligation provenance beginning with the four source-invalid QF_SEQ rows.

gaps.title: Turn external Lean checking into a required tiered gate
gaps.question: Does official Lean accept a visible representative and exhaustive population of generated solver proofs without sorryAx?
gate_commands: AXEYUM_REQUIRE_LEAN=1 AXEYUM_LEAN_BUDGET_SECS=0 AXEYUM_LEAN_JOBS=2 cargo test -p axeyum-solver --features full --test lean_crosscheck lean_crosscheck_representative -- --nocapture --exact
gaps.next_action: Archive the first required remote duration, RSS, checked-family count, and declined manifest before sizing the exhaustive scheduled gate.

gaps.title: Separate Lean certificate goals from kernel-compatibility research
gaps.question: Which versioned Lean-core profile does the Rust kernel accept identically to official Lean, independent of solver proof coverage?
gaps.next_action: Specify the compatibility corpus, then sequence bignum literals before literal typing, projections/eta, recursive inductives/positivity, quotients, and import format.

gaps.title: Measure the SMT-LIB and API compatibility surface
gaps.question: Which commands are parsed, ordered, executed, rendered, and independently checked as one transactional SMT-LIB session?
gaps.next_action: Review proposed ADR-0342; if accepted, implement capture-only ordered command/event IR before rendering or adding command families.

gaps.title: Prove deployability claims with real consumer profiles
gaps.question: What time, memory, artifact-size, certificate-coverage, fallback, and decided-rate tradeoff does each real native/WASM consumer select?
gaps.next_action: Generate one native/WASM Pareto table with cold/warm latency, RSS, bundle size, certificate coverage, fallback rate, and decided rate.

gaps.title: Reduce reviewer and contributor risk
gaps.question: Can a new contributor find the owning module, evidence, checker, decision, and next safe action without reading PLAN/STATUS as battle logs?
gaps.next_action: Use this map during the next gap increment; split the remaining monolith/API surfaces only behind behavior-preserving gates.
